---
title: "Reiley Heffern"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jpswalsh/academicons@1/css/academicons.min.css">

<script src="https://kit.fontawesome.com/25264fd477.js" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>

## Reiley Heffern (she/her)

[<i class="fa-solid fa-envelope fa-2x"></i>](mailto:rkhgyg@missouri.edu) [<i class="ai ai-orcid-square ai-2x"></i>](https://orcid.org/0009-0001-4904-4093)

::: {layout-ncol=2}

I am an undergraduate researcher in the [MU Division of Biological Sciences](https://biology.missouri.edu/). My interests include genetics, disease models, and disease inheritance.

![](Headshotcopy.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of Reiley"}

:::

I'm from St. Louis, MO and am a senior biological sciences major here at Mizzou. Outside of the King Lab, I work as a Peer Navigator for the MU College of Arts & Science and as an at-home, Nespresso-enthusiast barista. After graduation, I plan to pursue a degree in genetic counseling!

### Research Projects

Currently, I'm investigating how variation in the presenilin gene (associated with family-inherited Alzheimer's disease) affects the severity of disease phenotype.
